name: Chocolate-Strawberry Scone Cake
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Butter or margarine, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. In a small bowl, combine milk, 1 whole egg, and 1 egg yolk. Mix into dry ingredients just until moistened.
3. Turn out onto lightly floured board; knead lightly several times, then bring dough together to form a ball.
4. Divide in half. Pat each half into a circle, 8-inches in diameter.
5. Place one circle on greased baking sheet; cover evenly with chocolate chips. Top with remaining circle; pressing lightly to seal edges.
6. Beat remaining egg white. Brush top of scone cake with egg white. Sprinkle generously with additional sugar.
7. With a sharp knife, slice halfway through the top layer to form six wedges.
8. Bake in a preheated 425°F oven for 18 to 20 minutes, until golden and springy to the touch. Transfer to a rack to cool slightly.
9. Whip cream, add 1 cup of the berries. Sweeten to taste.
10. Serve wedges of warm scone cake with remaining berries and strawberry whipped cream.
